page_metadata.biotools__summary: ABEILLE (ABerrant Expression Identification empLoying machine LEarning from sequencing data) is a variational autoencoder (VAE) based method for the identification of AGEs from the analysis of RNA-seq data without the need of replicates or a control group.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: ABEILLE (ABerrant Expression Identification empLoying machine LEarning from sequencing data) is a variational autoencoder (VAE) based method for the identification of AGEs from the analysis of RNA-seq data without the need of replicates or a control group.
